sections.paragraph: f. const. דְּבֶלֶת plur. דְּבֵלִים cakes made of dried figs, pressed together in lumps; Gr. παλάθη (from דְּבַלְתָּא, ܕܒܶܠܬܐܳ, the Daleth being omitted), 1Sa 25:18 1Ch 12:40 with the addition of תְּאֵנִים 2Ki 20:7. See Celsii Hierobot. vol. ii. page 377-79; J. E. Faber on Harmer’s Observations, i. page. 389, seq.
